prose: The frontier orbitals calculation on formaldehyde was completed successfully. The calculation was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory in the gas phase. The HOMO energy is -7.6523 eV, the LUMO energy is -1.7826 eV, and the HOMO-LUMO gap is 5.8697 eV. The calculation converged in 8 SCF cycles and no warnings were reported.
